hypotheses.name: Bootstrap CI on activation vs repression co-pole differential
hypotheses.method: Bootstrap resample (N=2000) TRRUST activation (116) and repression (64) pairs separately at each of 12 layers. Compute 95% CI on obs_act - obs_rep co-pole rate. Report CI coverage of zero and one-sided p-value.
hypotheses.result_value: 0/12 layers 95% CI excludes zero; 0/12 layers p<0.05; obs_diff range 0.005-0.062
hypotheses.next_action: Retire act-vs-rep CI test as a standalone claim. The per-edge-type empirical p-values from iter_0011 (act significant 12/12, rep significant 1/12) remain valid but the bootstrap CI on the differential is inconclusive due to small sample size (n_rep=64). Focus on alternative evidence for signed geometry.

hypotheses.name: Mean pairwise SV2 distance — spatial concentration test (activation vs repression)
hypotheses.method: For each of 12 layers: compute SV2 projections for 209 named genes. Compute mean absolute SV2 distance for TRRUST activation (116) and repression (64) pairs. Null: N=500 gene-label shuffles. Empirical p: fraction null <= obs.
hypotheses.result_value: act concentrated (lower distance) at 10/12 layers p<0.05; rep concentrated at 6/12 layers p<0.05; act_dist < rep_dist at only 4/12 layers
hypotheses.next_action: TRRUST activation pairs are significantly more spatially concentrated in SV2 than random at 10/12 layers. This is independent evidence of regulatory geometry beyond pole membership. Follow up: test whether act pairs are more concentrated than rep pairs using direct paired comparison.

hypotheses.name: STRING PPI co-pole enrichment across 12 layers
hypotheses.method: Download STRING v12.0 PPI for 209 named genes via API. Filter to score>=0.7 (high-confidence): 1022 unique pairs. Run co-pole enrichment test (top-K=52 / bottom-K=52 SV2 poles, N=500 gene-label shuffles) at each of 12 layers.
hypotheses.result_value: 12/12 layers significant (emp_p<0.05); z-scores range 3.26-6.52; obs co-pole 0.198-0.266 vs null mean 0.121-0.123
hypotheses.next_action: STRING PPI co-pole signal is extremely strong (z=3.3-6.5, 12/12 layers). This provides cross-graph-type convergent validation: physical protein-protein interactions are geometrically co-localized in SV2 space, independent of transcriptional regulation. Next: test STRING PPI co-pole on SV1 and SV3 to see if the effect is SV2-specific.
